ordering_rules: Entries are sorted by normalized path ascending.
status_class uses the P-0 intake vocabulary.
canonicality_assessment uses the P-1 extraction vocabulary.
confidence values are high, medium, or low.
extraction_limits: Top-level and major sub-root landscape only; this is not yet the final architecture graph.

entries.name: .github
entries.apparent_domain: ci and repository automation
entries.notes: Contains active workflow automation, including ci and projection-sanity jobs.

entries.name: .xstack_cache
entries.apparent_domain: xstack cache and generated state
entries.notes: Large cache surface; evidence of tooling activity but not a canonical planning source on its own.

entries.name: app
entries.apparent_domain: shared application runtime support
entries.notes: Root CMake adds this before product roots and exposes app::runtime.

entries.name: appshell
entries.apparent_domain: python operator shell, bootstrap, ipc, supervisor, and tui support
entries.notes: Not registered through the same CMake path as compiled products, but clearly active and non-legacy.

entries.name: archive
entries.apparent_domain: archive and deterministic bundle support
entries.notes: Small live root with archive-related implementation, distinct from generated artifacts.

entries.name: artifacts
entries.apparent_domain: generated reports and toolchain run outputs
entries.notes: Evidence surface with emitted reports and run manifests; use only with provenance.

entries.name: attic/src_quarantine
entries.apparent_domain: explicitly quarantined source residue
entries.notes: Explicit quarantine marker; non-canonical until reviewed.

entries.name: build
entries.apparent_domain: generated build trees, validation bundles, and copied schemas
entries.notes: Contains many generated subtrees and schema echoes; not a source-of-truth layer.

entries.name: client
entries.apparent_domain: compiled client product root
entries.notes: Defines dominium_client and registers the client product in CMake.

entries.name: compat
entries.apparent_domain: compatibility negotiation, lifecycle, and shims
entries.notes: Contains negotiation, descriptor, and migration-related live code.

entries.name: control
entries.apparent_domain: control-plane engine, planning, proof, and capability surfaces
entries.notes: Strong live root for control-plane concerns.

entries.name: core
entries.apparent_domain: graph, schedule, state, spatial, and hazard substrate
entries.notes: Looks like shared runtime substrate rather than legacy scaffolding.

entries.name: data
entries.apparent_domain: registries, architecture graphs, baselines, planning data, and pack declarations
entries.notes: Mixed but central data root with many authoritative subfamilies.

entries.name: data/architecture
entries.apparent_domain: module graph, structure lock, and architecture registries
entries.notes: Contains architecture graph and repository structure lock artifacts.

entries.name: data/packs
entries.apparent_domain: pack declarations and content data in toml and manifest forms
entries.notes: Live machine-readable pack surface, but coexists with packs/** and needs later scope reconciliation.

entries.name: data/registries
entries.apparent_domain: registry and policy declarations
entries.notes: High-signal machine-readable control surface across component, compat, and policy domains.

entries.name: docs
entries.apparent_domain: architecture, release, planning, governance, and collaborator prose
entries.notes: Contains both scoped doctrine and general notes; authority depends on document family.

entries.name: engine
entries.apparent_domain: compiled engine/runtime core
entries.notes: Major compiled runtime surface with modules, platform, render, time, and tests.

entries.name: field
entries.apparent_domain: field engine and boundary exchange logic
entries.notes: Coexists with fields/** and shares field-engine naming.

entries.name: fields
entries.apparent_domain: field engine surface
entries.notes: Coexists with field/** and shares field-engine naming.

entries.name: game
entries.apparent_domain: compiled game/content/rules root
entries.notes: Major compiled companion to engine with content, rules, mods, and tests.

entries.name: geo
entries.apparent_domain: geometric, frame, path, and world-projection domain logic
entries.notes: Large semantic root with multiple engine-like files and subdomains.

entries.name: governance
entries.apparent_domain: runtime governance profile surface
entries.notes: Small live code root distinct from docs/governance policy prose.

entries.name: launcher
entries.apparent_domain: compiled launcher product root
entries.notes: Defines launcher core plus CLI, GUI, TUI, and Win32 entrypoints.

entries.name: legacy
entries.apparent_domain: legacy mirrors, orphaned material, and previous product/core layouts
entries.notes: Explicit mixed-state archaeology root with multiple mirrored product families.

entries.name: lib
entries.apparent_domain: python install, instance, save, bundle, and provider utilities
entries.notes: Live utility root distinct from libs/** even though naming overlaps.

entries.name: libs
entries.apparent_domain: compiled shared libraries and contracts
entries.notes: Root CMake adds libs early; contracts and appcore are used across products.

entries.name: logic
entries.apparent_domain: logic elements, protocols, timing, and fault models
entries.notes: Broad semantic root with clear live implementation files.

entries.name: machines
entries.apparent_domain: machine and port domain logic
entries.notes: Small but live domain root.

entries.name: materials
entries.apparent_domain: material composition, construction, provenance, and performance
entries.notes: Large domain root with multiple subdomains and engine-like files.

entries.name: net
entries.apparent_domain: network transport, anti-cheat, policies, and serialization-related logic
entries.notes: Live runtime/control surface for networking and integrity policies.

entries.name: packs
entries.apparent_domain: pack-driven runtime and domain manifests
entries.notes: Strong live pack surface with pack.json, compat, capability, and trust descriptors.

entries.name: process
entries.apparent_domain: process maturity, qc, drift, and capsules
entries.notes: Live process-related root that may later connect into constitutional Process doctrine.

entries.name: quarantine
entries.apparent_domain: explicit quarantine marker surface
entries.notes: Currently small, but the root itself is an explicit no-silent-canonicalization signal.

entries.name: reality
entries.apparent_domain: reality ledger and transition logic
entries.notes: High-signal semantic root for later Λ-series reconciliation.

entries.name: release
entries.apparent_domain: release, archive, build-id, component-graph, and update resolution code
entries.notes: Small but highly focused release-control root.

entries.name: repo
entries.apparent_domain: repository policy, canon-state assertion, and repox rules
entries.notes: Contains release policy, canon-state, and repository rulesets.

entries.name: runtime
entries.apparent_domain: small runtime root currently centered on process spawning
entries.notes: Live but thin; presence is real, canonical ownership scope is not yet obvious.

entries.name: schema
entries.apparent_domain: schema law, semantic contracts, and specification prose
entries.notes: P-0 authority order places semantic authority here over schemas/** when meaning conflicts.

entries.name: schemas
entries.apparent_domain: machine-readable schema projections and examples
entries.notes: Validator-facing schema projection surface that coexists with schema/**.

entries.name: scripts
entries.apparent_domain: verification, ide generation, ci, audit, and repox support scripts
entries.notes: Active automation surface used by CI and local verification.

entries.name: security
entries.apparent_domain: security and trust verification support
entries.notes: Currently centered on security/trust verification modules.

entries.name: server
entries.apparent_domain: compiled authoritative server product root
entries.notes: Defines dominium_server and registers the server product in CMake.

entries.name: setup
entries.apparent_domain: compiled setup product root with packaging scripts
entries.notes: Defines setup product entrypoints and owns a packaging-script subtree.

entries.name: signals
entries.apparent_domain: signal addressing, aggregation, institutions, and trust domain logic
entries.notes: Strong semantic root with multiple live subdomains.

entries.name: system
entries.apparent_domain: system reliability, certification, forensics, statevec, and validation logic
entries.notes: Another strong semantic root relevant to later Λ-series work.

entries.name: tools
entries.apparent_domain: compiled tools product plus extensive operator, validation, and xstack surfaces
entries.notes: CMake registers a tools product and the root also hosts release, distribution, validation, and xstack tooling.

entries.name: universe
entries.apparent_domain: universe identity and contract enforcement
entries.notes: Small but high-signal semantic root.

entries.name: updates
entries.apparent_domain: channel manifests and changelog surfaces
entries.notes: Channel and changelog manifests are present directly under the root.

entries.name: worldgen
entries.apparent_domain: world generation and astronomical/planetary derivation
entries.notes: Large semantic root and strong extension candidate for future world/domain work.
